arts.ttl: Who will be in goal for Germany against Italy?
arts.sum: Both Bild and Sky Germany are reporting that Oliver Baumann - and not Alexander Nübel - will start in goal for Germany against Italy.

Following the retirement of Manuel Neuer and injury to Marc-André ter Stegen, Oliver Baumann (Hoffenheim) and Alexander Nübel (Stuttgart) have shared Germany’s No. 1 position. But according to Kicker, Baumann…
